title: The Sum of Saving Knowledge
author: Westminster Assembly

source.name: thewestminsterstandard.org
source.license_notes: 17th-century text; no copyrightable original content added by host site.

notes: Completeness: partial -- inline proof texts deferred to Phase 2.
Attributed to David Dickson and James Durham (c. 1650); appended to Westminster Standards by Church of Scotland.
9 top-level sections: Preface, The Sum (intro), Heads I-IV, Practical Use (large), Warrants to Believe (4 subsections), Evidences of True Faith (4 subsections).
Hierarchical structure: Warrants to Believe and Evidences of True Faith contain nested child sections.
